chunk.content: The Ebbinghaus forgetting curve demonstrates that memory retention decays exponentially over time without reinforcement. The formula R(t) = e^(−t/S) models this decay where S represents memory stability.

results.highlight: The <mark>Ebbinghaus forgetting curve</mark> demonstrates that <mark>memory retention</mark> decays exponentially

chunk.content: React's useCallback hook memoizes a function so it maintains referential equality across renders. Use it when passing callbacks to optimized child components to prevent unnecessary re-renders.

results.highlight: React's <mark>useCallback hook</mark> memoizes a function so it maintains referential equality
